Legal

Cookie Policy

Effective date: 07 May 2026

This Cookie Policy explains how VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED (“Vorynex”, “we”, “us”) uses cookies and similar technologies on our website and online services. For broader data handling details, please review our Privacy Policy.

1) What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device by a website. Similar technologies include local storage, pixels, SDKs, and identifiers used to recognize your browser/device, improve performance, and support security.

2) Types of cookies we may use

  • - Strictly necessary: required for core site functions, security, and fraud prevention.
  • - Performance/analytics: help us understand traffic and usage trends to improve reliability and user experience.
  • - Functional: remember preferences (where applicable) such as language or session settings.

3) How we use cookies

  • - Maintain session integrity and protect against malicious activity.
  • - Measure performance, detect errors, and improve service quality.
  • - Improve navigation and ensure consistent presentation.

4) Third-party cookies

Some cookies may be set by third-party service providers (for example, analytics or infrastructure providers) to help us operate and improve the Services. Such providers process data under their own policies and contractual obligations with us.

5) Managing cookie preferences

You can control cookies through browser settings (block, delete, or limit). Disabling certain cookies may affect site functionality and performance. Where consent is required for non-essential cookies, we will provide appropriate notice/controls.

6) Updates

We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

7) Contact

For cookie/privacy questions: contact@vorynex.in

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED

Enterprise-grade SaaS and online software services from India.
